title: September 30
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 30''' is the 273rd day of the year (274th in leap years), with 92 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Chris Eliopoulos]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Alistair Petrie]] is born.
*1970 – [[Mark Bazeley]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Kieron Gillen]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Jon Kasdan]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Lacey Chabert]] is born.
*[[1993]] – ''[[Jedi Dawn]]'' published.
*[[1994]] – [[Sydney Walker]] dies.
*[[1997]] – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] finishes.
*[[2003]] – ''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' published.
*2003 – ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[What's The Story?]] Round 2 published in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]].
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Act on Instinct]]'' webcomic begins.
*2009 – [[Legacy (2006) 40|''Legacy'' (2006) 40]] published.
*[[2011]] – "[[Shadow Warrior]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2013]] – ''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Expanded Visual Dictionary]]'' was to be released, but was cancelled.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars Poster-A-Page: The Skywalker Saga: Episodes I-VI]]'' published.
*2014 – ''[[Star Wars Rebels Poster-A-Page: Rogue Heroes]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 10|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 10]] published in Germany.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story]]'' edition of [[Force Friday]], featuring the initial release of ''Rogue One'' toys and merchandise.
*[[2020]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 4|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 4]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars Adventures: The Clone Wars – Battle Tales 5|''Star Wars Adventures: The Clone Wars – Battle Tales'' 5]] published.
*2020 – [[R2-D2 (reference book)|''R2-D2'']] published in [[Wikipedia:French language|French]].
*[[2024]] – [[Robert Watts]] dies.
*[[2025]] – ''[[William Shakespeare's The Force Doth Awaken: Star Wars Part the Seventh]]'' reprinted.
*2025 – ''[[William Shakespeare's Jedi the Last: Star Wars Part the Eighth]]'' reprinted.
*2025 – ''[[William Shakespeare's The Merry Rise of Skywalker: Star Wars Part the Ninth]]'' reprinted.
<noinclude>
